scope: real Hermes runtime, disposable board, explicit kanban_complete instruction

auth_resolution.method: OpenAI Codex device-code auth refreshed at the global Hermes home, then the stale local openai-codex shadow was removed from the factory-orchestrator profile so the profile used the validated global fallback.

limits: This receipt is sanitized for the public repository.

It does not prove specialist output quality, parent done reconciliation, production rollback or release readiness.
